samples.gvd:
module pulse_detect #(
    parameter s0 = 2'b00,
    parameter s1 = 2'b01,
    parameter s2 = 2'b10,
    parameter s3 = 2'b11
) (
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input data_in,
    output reg data_out
);

    reg [1:0] state, next_state;
    
    
    always@(posedge clk,negedge rst_n)begin
        if(!rst_n)begin
            state <= s0;
        end
        else begin
            state <= next_state;
        end
    end
    
    always@(*)begin
        case(state)
            s0:begin
                if(data_in==0)begin
                    next_state = s1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state = s0;
                end
            end
            
            s1:begin
                if(data_in==1)begin
                    next_state = s2;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state = s1;
                end
            end
            
            s2:begin
                if(data_in==0)begin
                    next_state = s3;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state = s0;
                end
            end
            
            s3:begin
                if(data_in==1)begin
                    next_state = s2;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state = s1;
                end
            end
        endcase
    end
    
    assign data_out = ((state == s2)&&(data_in == 0))?1:0;

endmodule
